description: Anthropic Messages streaming with the 2025-08-25 code execution server tool and a skill-like workflow (fixture derived from AI SDK tests). Validates long tool input streaming and large tool results.

source.notes: Replayed via FakeAnthropicClient; encoded as canonical AI SDK v3 JSONL via encodeV3StreamParts.

notes: This scenario is intentionally large to catch ordering issues between tool-input parts, tool-call, and tool-result.
